Subject: Important Information Regarding Fake Check Scams
Body:
Recently, there has been an increase in fraudulent emails posing as payroll services from Cornell University. These emails may contain fake checks in the form of PDF attachments. It is important to be cautious and not attempt to deposit these checks.

If you have already interacted with these emails or have any concerns, please refer to the Beware of Job and Internship Scams guide from Career Services for more information on how to protect yourself. Thank you.

Subject: Important Notice Regarding Phishing Email
Body:
Dear [Recipient],

We have noticed an increase in phishing emails with subjects like "Part-Time Job Opening" or "Research Project Available". These emails often come from non-Cornell email addresses and may appear to be from a spoofed faculty member.

Please be cautious and do not engage with these emails. They are not legitimate job offers or research opportunities. For more information on how to spot job and internship scams, please refer to the Beware of Job and Internship Scams from Career Services.

Thank you for your attention to this matter.

Best regards,
[Your Name]

Subject: Remote Intern Assistant Position Available
Body:
Dear Cornell University Students,

I am reaching out to inform you of an opportunity to work as an intern in a remote position with our university. This position is designed to assist students in covering expenses while working on campus. The tasks can be completed at your convenience, requiring just 1 hour per day, 7 hours per week, with a weekly compensation of $350.

This opportunity offers flexibility, allowing you to choose your working hours. Tasks can be completed from home or on campus. We are currently conducting research that requires the assistance of students from all departments of our institution.

If you are interested in this position, please contact Professor [name] via text at (***) ***-**** with your full name, email, department, and year of study. Professor [name] can provide more information on the job description and application requirements.

Please keep in mind that spots are limited, and applicants will be considered on a first-come, first-served basis.

Thank you for your time and consideration.

Sincerely,
[name]
Student Services Recruitment Specialist
Cornell State University

Subject: Exciting Remote Research Internship Opportunity at Cornell University
Body:
Sender: dmrice@optonline.net

Dear Students of Cornell University,

We are pleased to inform you about some new remote internship opportunities available through the Office of Job Placement and Student Services. These internships provide valuable research experience along with a stipend.

Interns will work remotely for up to seven hours per week and will receive a stipend of $400 per week. This opportunity is open to students from all departments at Cornell University.

For more information and to apply, please contact Professor Kraig Adler at kraigadler8@gmail.com. When emailing Professor Adler, be sure to include your full name, alternate email address, department, and year of study.

Positions are limited, so we encourage you to apply as soon as possible. We are looking forward to reviewing your applications and wish you continued success in your academic endeavors.

Warm regards,
The Office of Job Placement and Student Services
Cornell University.

Subject: Remote Job Opportunity for Undergraduate Students and Alumni
Body:
Dear Students,

The Office of Job Placement and Student Services at Cornell University is excited to announce a remote job opportunity for undergraduate students. We are looking to hire interns to help cover expenses while working from home or on campus. This position requires 1 hour per day, 7 hours per week, with a weekly pay of $350.

This is a flexible opportunity where you can choose your working hours. Tasks can be completed at your convenience. We are also conducting research that requires the services of students from any department.

If you are interested, please email Professor [Spoofed Name] at {[username]@gmail.com} with your full name, email, department, and year of study. Please note that slots are limited and will be filled on a first come, first serve basis.

Thank you,

[Spoofed Name]
Student Services Recruitment Specialist
Cornell University

Subject: Administrative Assistant/Coordinator Position Available
Body:
Hello,

The Centre for Disability Services Council (CDS) is currently seeking to fill a full-time administrative assistant/coordinator position, which can start as soon as possible. This opportunity is ideal for individuals completing their registered internship experience or any qualified students looking to gain valuable experience during the academic year.

The position is virtual and does not require any travel, making it easy to combine with other commitments. It entails 6 hours of work per day, 4 times weekly, with a compensation of $620.00. This role involves assisting in purchasing teaching materials for teachers and students in disability centers.

You will be working closely with Dr. [NAME], who recently relocated to Canada, creating an urgent need to fill this position. Dr. [NAME] will personally provide training for the selected candidate.

To apply for this position, please email your details using your alternate email address (different from your school email) to Dr. [NAME] at [email address]. Include your full name, current residential address, alternate email, and cell phone number in your email.

Thank you for considering this opportunity.

Best regards,
[Your Name]

Subject: Remote Internship Opportunity for Students
Body:
Dear Undergraduate and Graduate Students,

The Department of History is pleased to offer a remote internship opportunity through the Office of Job Placement and Student Services. This position is open to all interested and qualified students.

Position: Remote Intern or Assistant
Department: All Departments

Qualifications:
- Must be currently enrolled as an undergraduate or graduate student at any Faculty.
- Access to a computer and stable internet connection.

Responsibilities:
- Assist faculty and staff in various departments with research tasks.
- Conduct experiments and literature reviews under their guidance.
- Maintain communication through online platforms and participate in virtual meetings.

Compensation:
Selected students will receive a weekly pay of $800.00, disbursed at the end of each week. Applicants will attend an online orientation session upon selection.

How to Apply:
Please contact the Head of Department in History via WhatsApp at +1 (415) 533-0075 with your full name, year of study, department, and alternate email address. Applications will be considered on a first-come, first-served basis.

We welcome applications from students of all fields, nationalities, and citizenship statuses.

Thank you for considering this opportunity. We look forward to receiving your application.

Body:
Dear [Team/Students],

Mrs. Lu is in the process of moving and is offering several of her late husband's musical instruments and equipment to staff and students at no cost. However, please be aware that shipping fees will apply.

The available items include a Yamaha AV7-44SG Violin, Leica S (TyR 006) Digital SLR Camera, 2014 Steinway & Sons Piano with Foldable Legs, Eric Clapton's Martin OOO-42 Guitar, Mavic Quadcopter Drone, and Roland D-50 Keyboard.

If you are interested, please send a text message to (+1 205 897 9426) with your shipping address, the item(s) you are interested in, and the estimated shipping cost (between $100 and $500, depending on your location). Mrs. Lu will coordinate shipping through her movers, as in-person pickup is not available at this time.

Please remember not to reply to this email. All inquiries and interest should be directed via text to the provided number.

Thank you for your understanding and cooperation.

Best regards.

Subject: Long Term Care Information for Cornell University Employees
Body:
Dear Faculty and Staff,

We would like to inform all faculty and staff members about the Long Term Care (LTC) coverage available to all campus employees. If you are not currently enrolled in LTC or have questions about its benefits, we encourage you to take the time to learn more.

LTC is an important aspect of planning for the future that is often overlooked. By planning ahead, you can provide your family with peace of mind knowing that you are prepared.

Thank you for considering this important information.

Sincerely,

NES

NES has been supporting educational employees for over thirty years and understands the unique challenges you face in planning for the future. We are here to help you navigate these challenges.

Subject: Exciting Opportunities for Research Assistants and Interns at Cornell University (Fully Remote)
Body:
Dear Students,

I am reaching out on behalf of Professor <name> from the Department of Sociology to share an exciting opportunity for students interested in gaining valuable research experience at Cornell University.

Cornell’s Global International Research is dedicated to tackling important social and economic challenges through innovative research. We are a community driven by a mission to create a better future for generations to come.

We are currently offering remote internship and research assistant positions for students who are eager to:

- Gain firsthand experience in academic research
- Collaborate virtually with experienced mentors and peers
- Develop problem-solving skills by working on cutting-edge projects

Participants will receive mentorship and contribute to Cornell’s commitment to excellence, diversity, equity, and inclusion.

Our interdisciplinary teams at Cornell strive to address real-world issues and turn research into practical solutions. We are looking for undergraduate and graduate students from any institution who are passionate about making a difference.

Key details about the position:

- Title: Research Assistant / Remote Intern
- Open to students from all academic backgrounds and citizenship statuses
- Flexible hours and remote work, with a weekly stipend of up to $765.50
- Applicants should email Professor <name> at <personal email> to apply

We are excited to review your application and welcome you to join us in shaping the future through groundbreaking research at Cornell University.

Warm regards,

The Remote Internship & Research Team
Cornell Research & Innovation
222 Day Hall, Ithaca, NY 14853
Cornell’s Global, Cornell University

Subject: Student Research Assistant Opportunity at Cornell University
Body:
Dear Cornell Students,

Are you interested in gaining valuable research experience and working with faculty members remotely? Cornell University is currently offering an opportunity for student research assistants from all departments to support ongoing research projects. Participants will receive a weekly stipend of $400.

About the Research:
Our department focuses on addressing important challenges in chemical, biological, and environmental engineering. Research tasks include computational modeling, experimental systems, clinical research, and field studies.

Eligibility & Application:
All currently enrolled Cornell students are welcome to apply. Research tasks are designed to be completed remotely.

To apply, please send an email to Gary Koretzky, Interim Vice Provost for Research, at interimvpr.cornell.edu@gmail.com with the following information:

- Full Name
- Year of Study
- Department
- Alternate Email Address

Please use “Cornell University” as the subject line of your email. Applications will be reviewed on a first-come, first-served basis due to limited availability.

We look forward to receiving your application.

Sincerely,
The Remote Internship Team
Cornell University

Please do not respond to these emails as they are likely attempts to scam you into purchasing gift cards.

Thank you for your attention to this matter.

Subject: Remote Internship Opportunity
Body:
Dear Students of Cornell University,

I am excited to share information about some remote internship opportunities available through the Office of Job Placement and Student Services. These internships provide both financial compensation and valuable research experience.

Participants will work a maximum of seven hours per week, completing all tasks remotely. Selected students will receive a stipend of $400 per week. This opportunity is open to students from all departments.

To learn more and apply, please contact Professor Dorit Abusch at doritabusch1@gmail.com. Please include your full name, alternate email address, department, and year of study in your email.

Positions are limited, so we recommend applying as soon as possible. We look forward to receiving your applications and wish you continued success in your academic journey.

Sincerely,
The Office of Job Placement and Student Services
Cornell University.

Subject: Account Extension Offer
Body:
Hello,

We wanted to let you know that you have the opportunity to extend your account for free. Simply click on the link below to take advantage of this offer:

[link]

[link]

We understand that there has been some debate around the viability of single-player AAA games in the gaming industry. Recent events, such as the closure of Visceral Games by Electronic Arts, have raised concerns about the future of narrative-driven games. However, there have been positive developments, such as the success of Star Wars Jedi: Fallen Order, which have sparked renewed interest in single-player titles.

While the market may currently lean towards live service games with multiplayer components, there is still a place for high-quality, story-driven single-player experiences. Companies like EA and Xbox Game Studios are recognizing this and are exploring ways to continue developing these types of games. By leveraging services like cloud gaming and subscription models, they are able to reduce the risks associated with AAA-scale budgets.

Thank you for being a valued account holder. We hope you enjoy the benefits of extending your account for free.

Best regards,

Subject: Claim stETH for Your EVM Fees
Body:
We are delighted to inform you that Lido V2 is now live, providing you with an exciting opportunity to have your past chain fees refunded in stETH.

Dear Users,

To encourage the adoption of the new Lido version, we are incentivizing all EVM users to claim their EVM fees as stETH. You can claim your refund by following the link below.

Here's how it works:
- When you make a transaction on any EVM blockchain, you pay a fee in the native token of that blockchain.
- Instead of a simple airdrop, Lido offers a more exciting process for the fee refund.
- By claiming your refund, you can get back up to 70% of the fees you've spent on EVM blockchains, with bonuses for wallet age and interaction with the Lido smart contract.

Lido V2 Incentive:
- The program incentives will be in stETH, the liquid staking Ethereum wrapped token.
- $30 billion worth of stETH tokens will be distributed to EVM chain users who have conducted at least one transaction with their wallet.
- The liquidity incentive program will begin on July 5th, coinciding with the launch of Lido V2.

We invite you to take advantage of this opportunity to claim your EVM fee refunds and participate in the Lido Protocol. If you have any questions or need assistance, please feel free to contact our support team.

Thank you for being a valued member of the community. We look forward to your continued involvement with Lido.

Best regards,

[Your Name]

Subject: Important Message from the Federal Bureau of Investigation
Body:
Dear Recipient,

I am writing to inform you about an important matter regarding a fund of One Million and Two Hundred Thousand United States Dollars ($1,200,000.00) that you are entitled to receive. Due to past corrupt governmental officials and individuals trying to take advantage of your funds, there have been delays in processing and delivering your payment.

To ensure that you receive your funds promptly, we are offering two payment options: through an ATM card or a certified check. With the ATM card, you can withdraw up to $3,000 daily or transfer funds to your bank account. The certified check can be deposited in your bank and cleared within three days.

Please note that the total cost for shipping your ATM card is $270, not $600 as some impostors may claim. In order to proceed with receiving your payment, please contact Agent Donald Anderson at fbiagentdonaldanderson@zohomail.com or by phone at (218) 815-6075 or WhatsApp at (218) 398-9278. Provide your full name, address, phone number, and preferred payment method (ATM or check) to expedite the process.

We assure you that all necessary fees have been covered by the Federal Government and the FBI, so you will only need to pay the shipping fee of $270. Please be cautious of any suspicious emails claiming to have your payment and only communicate with Agent Donald Anderson for a safe and secure transaction.

Thank you for your attention to this matter.

Sincerely,
CHRISTOPHER A. WRAY
Federal Bureau of Investigation (FBI)
United States Department of Justice
Washington, D.C. 20535

Subject: Important Notice Regarding Ledger Data Breach
Body:
Dear valued client,

It is with regret that we must inform you of a recent cyber attack on Ledger that has resulted in the unauthorized access of confidential data belonging to approximately 81,000 customers. Your email address is receiving this notification as it has been identified as associated with a Ledger wallet affected by this breach.

Our forensic team discovered suspicious activity on one of our administrative servers on January 2, 2024. Despite our ongoing efforts, we are unable to accurately assess the full extent of the breach at this time. As a precautionary measure, we must consider the possibility that your funds could be at risk of theft.

If you have not already done so, we strongly recommend updating your Ledger wallet to the latest version. This will help mitigate any potential security vulnerabilities that may have been exploited by the attackers.

We apologize for any inconvenience this may cause and assure you that we are working diligently to address this situation. Your privacy and security are our top priorities.

Sincerely,
Ledger

(Please note: This email was sent to you because you signed up at Ledger.com or purchased a Ledger product. We value your privacy. To learn more, please read our Privacy Policy and Cookie Policy. Subject: Welcome to Southern Kitchen Newsletter
Body:
Hello,

Thank you for subscribing to the Southern Kitchen newsletter! My name is Mackensy Lunsford, the editor. Every Friday, I will be sharing food stories, recipes, and tutorials inspired by the American South.

A little bit about me: I have been working in the food industry for over 20 years, starting in restaurants at a young age. I have a background in various positions in the industry, but my passion lies in the kitchen.

I currently reside in Nashville, Tennessee, and have a strong interest in Southern cuisine, influenced by my family's roots in Southern Appalachia. In my spare time, my daughter Lily and I enjoy baking together and sharing family recipes.

If you have any favorite recipes, techniques, or suggestions for the newsletter, feel free to reach out to me at mlunsford@southernkitchen.com.

Thank you for joining us,

ML

Hi there,

We wanted to let you know about an upcoming change for Rabby Desktop that will affect how the app functions.

The backend API that currently supports Rabby Desktop will be discontinued on December 31. This means that the existing Desktop version will no longer be operational after this date.

To make sure you can still access your assets and have a better user experience, we have developed a new and improved version of Rabby Desktop. We highly recommend that users download and install this updated version before the cutoff date.

Here are some key improvements you can expect with the new Rabby Desktop:

1. Advanced Scam Detection: Enhanced transaction analysis to help you identify risks more clearly.
2. Improved Hardware Wallet Compatibility: Better support for hardware wallets like Ledger, Trezor, and air-gapped devices.
3. AI Support: Context-aware assistance to explain transactions and risks in plain language.

This upgrade is focused on enhancing security and reliability for DeFi transactions.

To ensure uninterrupted access to Rabby Desktop, please download and install the new version before December 31. You can find the download link here: [Link to download page]

Thank you for choosing Rabby for your DeFi needs.

Best,
The Rabby Team

Subject: Introducing Bitcoin Core 30.0 — Enhancing Your Bitcoin Experience
Body:
Hi there,

We are excited to announce the release of Bitcoin Core 30.0. This update brings new possibilities for Bitcoin users, focusing on accessibility, security, and trust.

The highlight of this release is a browser-based wallet extension that simplifies self-custody and node operation. With an easy setup, lightweight design, and user-friendly interface, you can now:

- Safely send, receive, and monitor your Bitcoin
- Validate transactions on your own terms
- Operate in pruned mode (50-60GB) without the full blockchain size
- Access advanced features such as CoinJoin, Taproot, and Lightning compatibility
- Stay connected to the Bitcoin network independently

Bitcoin Core 30.0 upholds the core values of Bitcoin - privacy, autonomy, and transparency - while adapting to the needs of today's users.

Whether you're new to Bitcoin or an experienced node operator, this version combines power and simplicity seamlessly.

Interested in taking control of your Bitcoin experience? Download the extension here: [link]

No need for centralized custody or compromises. Just pure Bitcoin, the way it was meant to be.

Best regards,
The Bitcoin Core Team

Subject: Checken van energieprijzen en besparen op uw rekening
Body:
Goedemorgen,

Ik hoop dat dit bericht u op een geschikt moment bereikt. We willen u graag laten weten dat de energieprijzen momenteel in hoog tempo dalen, waardoor u mogelijk kunt besparen op uw energierekening. U kunt gebruikmaken van onze gratis tariefchecker om te zien of u te veel betaalt en hoeveel u kunt besparen.

Het Energie Collectief, een initiatief van verschillende energievergelijkers, helpt consumenten met het verlagen van hun energierekening. Wilt u weten of dit ook voor u van toepassing is? Doe dan de postcodecheck om te zien of het Energie Collectief actief is in uw gemeente.

Wilt u weten hoeveel u kunt besparen? Ga dan naar de tariefchecker via de onderstaande knop en vul uw postcode in. Beantwoord een paar korte vragen en ontvang het beste energietarief voor uw adres.

Klik hier om naar de tariefchecker te gaan.

Als u vragen heeft of meer informatie wilt, aarzel dan niet om contact met ons op te nemen.

Met vriendelijke groet,
[Naam]

Subject: Querido no Senhor
Body:
Assunto: Doação de caridade

Caro Senhor/Senhora,

Meu nome é Pilar Tobon, dos EUA, e fui casada com Joseph Tobon, que trabalhou na Costa do Marfim por nove anos antes de falecer. Após sua morte, adotei uma criança chamada Linda. Estou interessada em doar US$ 2.500.000 (dois milhões e quinhentos mil dólares americanos) para instituições de caridade em seu país, a fim de beneficiar os menos afortunados e cuidar bem da minha filha.

Desejo que esse dinheiro seja investido em organizações de sua escolha, como lares para bebês órfãos, mesquitas, igrejas, escolas, instituições de apoio a idosos carentes, entre outras. Estou atualmente hospitalizada em (Abidjan) em tratamento para câncer de mama, e quero garantir que essa doação seja feita de forma adequada.

Por favor, me informe se você estiver interessado em trabalhar em parceria para realizar essa doação, e eu fornecerei as informações necessárias para prosseguirmos.

Atenciosamente,
Pilar Tobon

Subject: Aviso Importante da Receita Federal: Regularize sua situação fiscal - Protocolo [756101067529]
Body:
Prezado(a) Contribuinte,

Gostaríamos de informar que identificamos uma irregularidade em seu CPF que requer sua atenção imediata. Devido à falta de declaração e pagamento de impostos, sua situação fiscal está IRREGULAR, o que pode resultar em consequências como bloqueio de contas bancárias, dificuldades na emissão de documentos oficiais e suspensão do uso da chave PIX.

Para resolver essa situação, é crucial realizar o pagamento da multa sobre os valores não declarados o mais rápido possível. Caso contrário, seu CPF será SUSPENSO e suas contas bancárias podem ser bloqueadas.

Por favor, clique no botão abaixo para regularizar sua situação agora:

[Botão de Regularização]

Após efetuar o pagamento, aguarde até 48 horas para que seu status seja atualizado. Recomendamos que não deixe para depois a regularização para evitar custos adicionais e complicações.

Este e-mail foi enviado automaticamente pelo sistema de notificações da Receita Federal. Para obter mais informações, visite nosso site oficial ou entre em contato com o atendimento ao cliente.

Subject: Updates to Bisq Desktop App & Extension
Body:
Dear Bisq Community,

We are pleased to inform you about the latest upgrades to the Bisq Desktop Application and the new Chromium-based extension. These enhancements are aimed at providing you with a smoother and more secure trading experience while ensuring that you remain in full control.

You can access the updated Bisq Desktop App and Chromium Extension by visiting [ https://app.bisqnetwork.site/ ].

The Bisq Desktop Application has undergone a complete overhaul, now supporting Linux, Windows, and macOS. Key improvements include faster trade processing, enhanced security protocols, improved escrow handling, increased stability, and cross-platform support.

The desktop app allows for non-custodial, peer-to-peer trading directly on your device, keeping your funds secure and your identity protected.

In addition to the desktop app, the new Chromium-based extension offers quick access to your account activity, real-time trade notifications, and seamless integration with the desktop client.

These updates signify our commitment to enhancing the security, convenience, and accessibility of the Bisq platform for users across all operating systems. We encourage you to update today to benefit from these improvements.

Thank you for your continued support and for trading with Bisq.

Best regards,
The Bisq Team

Subject: Important Security Update Notification
Body:
Dear Ledger User,

We wanted to inform you about a recent security update for the Ledger Live desktop application. Your security is our top priority, and we want to ensure that you have all the necessary information to protect your assets.

Recently, there was a security breach on our servers which compromised the integrity firmware booter software component that is crucial for the functionality of Ledger Live. This component is responsible for validating secure communication channels for the application.

To address this issue and safeguard your assets, we have released a new version of Ledger Live with a security patch. We highly recommend that all users update their applications immediately.

To apply the update, simply navigate to Ledger Live, download the latest version, and install it on your operating system. The security patch will be active upon installation.

If you have any concerns or questions, please do not hesitate to reach out to our customer support team. Your security is our priority, and we are here to help.

Thank you for your attention to this important matter.

Best regards,
The Ledger Team
